description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 11. Better current-task / suggested-response lifecycle management**.

Goal: define the replace / merge / preserve / clear rules for `currentTask` and `suggestedResponse` now that Tier 1 work has made completion, timing, specificity, and layout more trustworthy.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/agents.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`

Worker notes:
- make the rules explicit in code/tests, not just implied by prompt wording
- account for completed work, supersession, and waiting-for-user transitions
- keep the public injected layout coherent with the semantics
title: Define replace, merge, and clear semantics for currentTask and suggestedResponse
